name: cloudzero-cost-analyst
description: AI-powered cloud cost analysis plugin providing comprehensive FinOps capabilities including cost spike investigation, trend analysis, anomaly detection, and optimization recommendations.
long_description:
The CloudZero Cost Analyst plugin enables intelligent cloud cost analysis through natural language conversations. It connects to CloudZero's platform to provide deep insights into your cloud spending across AWS, GCP, and Azure.

## Features

- **Cost Spike Investigation** — Identify and explain sudden cost increases
- **Trend Analysis** — Analyze spending patterns and forecast future costs
- **Cost Comparison** — Benchmark costs across time periods, teams, and environments
- **Service Deep Dives** — Detailed analysis of specific cloud services
- **Tag Coverage Analysis** — Evaluate tagging quality and governance
- **Custom Dimension Analysis** — Business-aligned cost visibility
- **Anomaly Detection** — Proactively find unusual spending patterns
- **Top Cost Drivers** — Identify highest-impact optimization opportunities

api_key.title: CloudZero API Key
api_key.description: Your CloudZero API key for authenticating with the cost analysis service. You can find this in your CloudZero account settings.

tools.name: get_org_context
tools.description: Retrieve organization-specific context including custom dimensions, workflows, and business information

tools.name: get_available_dimensions
tools.description: Discover what dimensions are available for cost analysis in this organization

tools.name: get_dimension_values
tools.description: Get distinct values for a specific cost dimension

tools.name: get_cost_data
tools.description: Query actual cost data grouped and filtered by dimensions

tools.name: get_reference_info
tools.description: Retrieve detailed reference documentation for CloudZero concepts
